summary_en: 410,000 shares (1.14% of S/O), ¥410M ceiling, May 18–June 26, 2026, ToSTNeT-3 or market purchase, to supply stock-option exercises.
title_en: Notice of Decision Regarding Acquisition of Treasury Stock (Acquisition Based on Articles of Incorporation under Companies Act Article 459(1))
translation_en_brief: On May 15, 2026, CREAL Inc.'s board of directors resolved to acquire up to 410,000 treasury shares (1.14% of issued shares excluding treasury stock) for a total outlay not to exceed ¥410 million. The acquisition will take place between May 18 and June 26, 2026 on the Tokyo Stock Exchange via ToSTNeT-3 (off-auction block trading) or market purchase under a discretionary trading agreement. The shares are to be used to satisfy stock-option exercises. As of April 30, 2026, the company held 1,140 treasury shares against 36,065,060 issued shares (excluding treasury stock).
